title: Inspect Z-Axis Cable Carrier Installation After Replacement
summary: Verify that a replaced Z-axis cable carrier is fully closed, properly seated, not pressing on the FFC, and visually uniform before returning the station to service.
when_to_use: Use after Z-axis cable carrier replacement work to confirm the installed carrier passes the documented visual and fit checks before panel reinstallation and operator station restart.
not_for: Do not use as a cable carrier replacement procedure.
Do not use when any inspection check fails, including open cross bars, dividers pressing on the FFC, joints not fully seated, or non-uniform carrier appearance end to end.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Perform the post-replacement inspection of the Z-axis cable carrier, determine whether the installation passes the documented checks, and only proceed to panel reinstallation and restart if the inspection passes.

safety_notes: This inspection is tied to replacement work and guarded access; the candidate assigns the safer role as L2_support.
Do not return the station to service if any cross bar is open, any divider presses on the FFC, any joint is not fully seated, or the carrier does not look uniform end to end.
access_or_tools_needed: Visual access to the installed cable carrier
Access to side panels as needed

access_required: Service-area access to view the installed Z-axis cable carrier
Access to top and/or bottom side panels if reinstallation is required
system_preconditions: Z-axis cable carrier replacement has been completed
The installed cable carrier is accessible for visual inspection

visual_references.description: Figure 7-17 Cable Carrier, associated with Z-Axis cable carrier replacement and divider positioning guidance.
Figure 7-14 Flat-Flex Cable, useful for identifying the FFC referenced in the inspection criteria.
System screen artifact associated with stopping and starting the operator station.

steps.title: Confirm all cable carrier cross bars are closed
steps.purpose: Verify the replaced cable carrier is fully closed after installation.
steps.instruction: Visually inspect the installed Z-axis cable carrier and confirm that all cross bars are closed.
steps.expected_result: All cross bars on the cable carrier are closed.
steps.healthy_condition: No open cross bars are visible anywhere on the installed carrier.

actions.label: Inspect cross bars
actions.exact_action: Visually inspect the cable carrier and confirm all cross bars are closed.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Overall cable carrier construction and link/cross-bar arrangement for the Z-axis cable carrier.

steps.title: Verify dividers are not pressing on the FFC
steps.purpose: Ensure the internal divider position does not create contact or pressure against the flat-flex cable.
steps.instruction: Check the internal dividers in the installed cable carrier and verify they are not pressing on the FFC.
steps.expected_result: The dividers do not press on the FFC.
steps.healthy_condition: Divider position leaves the FFC free from divider pressure; nearby source guidance indicates dividers should be fully to one side against the air line to prevent air line contact with the FFC.
steps.failure_condition: Any divider presses on the FFC.

actions.label: Inspect divider-to-FFC clearance
actions.exact_action: Check that the internal dividers are not pressing on the FFC.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Cable carrier divider locations and routing area between the cable and air line.
Identification of the flat-flex cable (FFC) referenced by the inspection criteria.

stop_or_escalate_if: Any divider presses on the FFC.

steps.title: Check that all cable carrier joints are fully seated
steps.purpose: Confirm the replaced carrier links are properly snapped together and seated.
steps.instruction: Inspect the cable carrier joints and verify that all joints are fully seated.
steps.expected_result: All cable carrier joints are fully seated.
steps.healthy_condition: Each joint appears fully engaged with no visible partial separation.
steps.failure_condition: Any joint is not fully seated.

actions.label: Inspect carrier joints
actions.exact_action: Check that all cable carrier joints are fully seated.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Link-to-link joints and snap-together connection points on the cable carrier.

stop_or_escalate_if: Any joint is not fully seated.

steps.title: Verify the cable carrier looks uniform end to end
steps.purpose: Confirm the installed carrier has a consistent appearance across its full length.
steps.instruction: Compare the cable carrier appearance from one end to the other and verify it looks uniform end to end.
steps.expected_result: The cable carrier appearance is uniform end to end.
steps.healthy_condition: The carrier looks visually consistent across its full length with no obvious irregular sections.
steps.failure_condition: The carrier does not look uniform end to end.

actions.label: Compare end-to-end appearance
actions.exact_action: Compare the carrier appearance end to end and verify it looks uniform end to end.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Overall end-to-end cable carrier appearance for a consistent, uniform installation.

stop_or_escalate_if: The carrier does not look uniform end to end.

steps.title: Reinstall panels and restart the operator station after a passing inspection
steps.purpose: Return the station to service only after the cable carrier installation passes inspection.
steps.instruction: If the inspection passes, reinstall the top and/or bottom side panels if necessary and restart the operator station using the referenced startup procedure.
steps.expected_result: Panels are reinstalled as needed and the operator station restart procedure is initiated using the referenced source procedure.
steps.healthy_condition: Inspection has passed and the station is ready for panel reinstallation and restart.
steps.failure_condition: Inspection has not passed, or the station is restarted before correcting identified cable carrier issues.

actions.label: Reinstall side panels
actions.exact_action: Reinstall the top and/or bottom side panels if necessary.

actions.label: Restart operator station
actions.exact_action: Restart the operator station using the referenced startup procedure.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: System/operator station screen context associated with startup actions referenced by the manual.

stop_or_escalate_if: Any inspection check failed before panel reinstallation or restart.
The referenced startup procedure cannot be completed.

success_criteria: All cable carrier cross bars are closed.
Internal dividers are not pressing on the FFC.
All cable carrier joints are fully seated.
The cable carrier looks uniform end to end.
After passing inspection, panels are reinstalled as needed and the operator station can be restarted using the referenced startup procedure.
healthy_conditions: The installed cable carrier passes the documented visual and fit checks.
The carrier is ready for panel reinstallation and operator station restart.
failure_conditions: Any divider presses on the FFC.
Any joint is not fully seated.
The carrier does not look uniform end to end.
The station is not ready to return to service after inspection.
escalation_guidance: Stop the procedure if any cross bar is open, any divider presses on the FFC, any joint is not fully seated, or the carrier does not look uniform end to end.
Do not reinstall panels and do not restart the operator station until the inspection passes.
Use L2_support for this inspection because it is tied to replacement work and guarded access.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Z-axis cable carrier figure for carrier layout, joints, and divider context.
FFC identification referenced by the inspection criteria.
Operator station/system screen context for the referenced startup procedure.
